name: Jerusalem Artichokes in Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the artichokes until just tender (about 10 minutes).
2. Drain and quickly peel the artichokes.
3. Wipe and dry the pot used for boiling.
4. Add the whole artichokes, butter, and cream to the pot.
5. Return to medium heat.
6. Cook, tossing frequently, until the cream has thickened and lightly coats the vegetables (about 3-4 minutes).
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
8. Transfer to a warm serving dish and serve immediately.
